name: Silkscreen over mask defined pads
description: Detect silkscreen ink deposited over pad copper that a solder-mask opening leaves exposed. Robust solder-mask-defined (SMD) vs non-SMD classification needs mask polarity this engine does not model, so this flags silk over any mask-exposed pad copper (and all pad copper if no mask layer is present).
what_it_measures: Total overlap AREA (mm^2) between silkscreen features and mask-exposed pad copper.
